name: Akhnoor Fort
description: A massive, two-storied fort perched dramatically on a cliff overlooking the mighty Chenab River. It holds immense historical and archaeological significance.
history: Built by Raja Tej Singh in 1802. Excavations nearby have revealed ancient terracotta figures belonging to the Harappan (Indus Valley) civilization.
famousFor: Chenab river views, ancient Indus Valley excavations.
